svg.title: Multi-engine context bus architecture
svg.desc: Diagram showing how multiple engines share a context bus and how the spatial workspace renders them
svg.text: Multi-engine OS — how they work together

g.text: shared event stream · all engines read and write

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the CRM engine publish contact selections to the context bus?')
sendPrompt('How does the email engine react to a contact selection?')
sendPrompt('How does the calendar engine react to meetings?')
sendPrompt('How does the document engine react to meeting alerts?')
sendPrompt('How does the dashboard engine react to CRM selections?')
sendPrompt('How does the chat engine connect to the context bus?')
sendPrompt('How does the code engine share state?')
sendPrompt('How does the sheet engine react to data changes?')
sendPrompt('How does form submission propagate to other engines?')
sendPrompt('How does video call state affect other engines?')
